$comment: Dashboards. Copied to layout.local.json (gitignored) on first build; edit that to rearrange. The grid is `columns` wide and (optionally) `rows` tall (equal-height rows that fill the screen; omit to grow with content). `dashboards` is an icon-tabbed list — the FIRST is Home (shown on load, auto-returned to after inactivity). Each widget is an instance: a unique `id` (scopes its visual `settings`), the `module` to render, col/row start (1-based) + w/h span (omit col/row to auto-flow). A module may appear on several dashboards with different settings. A dashboard may override `columns`/`rows`.
